items.title: Drift Protocol's $285 Million Exploit on Solana Raises Questions Over DeFi Security
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $285 million exploit of Drift Protocol highlights significant vulnerabilities in DeFi security on Solana, impacting investor confidence and ecosystem integrity.

items.title: How a Solana feature designed for convenience let attackers drain more than $270 million from Drift
items.whyYouShouldCare: A feature intended for user convenience inadvertently allowed attackers to siphon over $270 million from Drift, raising concerns about the design of DeFi protocols.

items.title: Drift explains $280M exploit as critics question Circle over USDC freeze
items.whyYouShouldCare: Drift's $280 million exploit has sparked criticism of Circle regarding the USDC freeze, potentially affecting liquidity and trust in stablecoin operations within Solana.
